title: cynoglossum cheirifolium var. mariolense
intro: Cynoglossum cheirifolium var. mariolense, a lesser-known variety of the Mediterranean forget-me-not plant, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum cheirifolium var. mariolense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
